name: Feature Request

## What would you like to see?

A clear description of the feature or improvement you're requesting.

## Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Existing lab — deploy script
- [ ] Existing lab — cleanup script
- [ ] Existing lab — README / walkthrough
- [ ] New lab project
- [ ] FinOps content
- [ ] Repo structure / GitHub templates
- [ ] Other

## Why is this useful?

How does this improve the learning experience or certification prep?

## AWS Services Involved

List any AWS services this would touch.

## Additional Context

Any other notes, references, or examples.
